summary: Tested multi-image upload feature for Add Product screen. Fixed backend ProductCreate model to support 'images' array and 'subcategory' fields. All backend tests (5/5) passed. Frontend UI tests verified all components render correctly.

fixed_by_tester.issue: ProductCreate model missing 'images' array and 'subcategory' fields
fixed_by_tester.fix: Added images: Optional[List[str]] and subcategory: Optional[str] to ProductCreate model in server.py

console_warnings.issue: Unexpected text node: . A text node cannot be a child of a <View>

verified_elements: Add Photo button visible and clickable
Hint text 'Add up to 5 photos. First image will be the main display image' visible
Multi-image horizontal scroll container renders properly
Form fields (name, description, category, subcategory, price) functional
Add Product submit button visible and functional
Form submission works - navigates back after success

updated_files: /app/backend/server.py - Added subcategory and images fields to ProductCreate model
seed_data_creation: None - tests clean up after themselves
context_for_next_testing_agent: Multi-image upload feature is working. Backend supports 'images' array and 'subcategory' fields. The image picker in UI requires browser/device media access which doesn't work in automated testing, but UI elements render correctly. Login flow: Enter phone (1212121212) -> Get OTP -> Enter 123456 -> Verify & Continue -> Navigate to /products/add
